landing.title: Track, budget, plan, and do more with your money | Monarch
landing.text:
Track, budget, plan, and do more with your money | Monarch
Opens in a new window
Opens an external website
Opens an external website in a new window
Close this dialog

More information can be found in our
Privacy Policy
Close Cookie Preferences
Get 30% OFF your first year with code WELCOME*
Features
For Couples
For Professionals
Pricing
Download
Sign in
Sign up
The modern way to manage money
Budget, track your progress, and plan for the future—all in one app.
Unlock better money habits
What is Monarch?
Your home base for money clarity
Monarch simplifies finances by bringing all your accounts together into one clear view. Always know where your money is and where it's going, achieve your goals quicker, and collaborate with your partner or professional at no extra cost.
Everything you need, all in one app
Connect your accounts and Monarch will do the heavy lifting to categorize your finances. From there, you can track, budget, collaborate, and set goals specific to you.
Track
Budget
Collaborate
Plan
Track
Know where you stand
From your net worth to day-to-day spending and cash flow, feel confident about where you’re at.
Learn more
Track
Know where you stand
From your net worth to day-to-day spending and cash flow, feel confident about where you’re at.
Learn more
Budget
Budgeting that fits your life
Create a budget that flexes to your needs - and not the other way around - so you can stay focused on the things that matter most.
Learn more
Collaborate
Make smart money moves together
Invite your partner to see your full picture, budget together, and reach your goals faster (and with more high fives).
Learn more
Plan
Set goals (and crush them)
From planning a vacation to a home remodel — track your goals and adjust your cash flow to make sure you stick the landing.
Learn more
Net Worth
All your accounts, in one place
Connect all your bank accounts, credit cards, loans, real estate, and investments to see your entire financial picture in one place. When you and your partner both sync your accounts, you’ll get a shared view of your finances—making it easier to stay aligned and plan together.
Transactions
Every transaction in one list
Monarch brings all your transactions into one clean, searchable list—no more jumping between apps or bank websites. You can mark transactions as reviewed to stay on top of your spending and quickly spot anything unexpected.
Recurring
Take control of your subscriptions
Monarch automatically detects your recurring subscriptions—like streaming services, gyms, or app memberships—so you never lose track of what you’re paying for. It’s an easy way to spot forgotten charges and take control of your monthly spending.
Reports
Visualize the flow of money
Dive deep into your finances with customizable charts that reveal where your money’s going. Whether you're tracking spending trends, income, or net worth over time, reports help you turn raw data into insights you can act on.
Goals
Your goals, on track
Create a clear plan to save for what matters—whether it’s a home, a vacation, or a rainy day fund. Set targets, track your progress, and stay motivated as you watch your savings grow over time.
Apps
On every device, always in sync
Monarch works seamlessly across web, iOS, and Android—so you can check in on your money anytime, anywhere. Whether you're planning on a laptop or reviewing your budget on the go, your finances are always in sync and ready when you are.
Syncing
Best-in-class data connectivity
Monarch syncs with multiple financial data providers, more than other apps, to connect with 13,000+ financial institutions and keep them in sync.
What our members say
“I love everything about this app. Building a budget is easy, tracking spending is awesome, and everything I wanted in an app this can do! So easy and flexible.”
App Store Review
“Because of this app, I feel like I am not winging it financially anymore and feel on top of my spending.”
App Store Review
"Finally a financial dashboard that allows for intuitive customization but also has a powerful set of pre-built functionality! Safe to say we’ve become more aware of our financial situation and made moves toward progress since joining Monarch Money."
App Store Review
“I love how many features (bill calendar, cash flow manager, easy budgeting, goal setup and tracking, etc) allow you to get a crystal clear picture of where you stand each month.”
App Store Review
"Mint shutting down was a blessing in disguise. Monarch is way better and the connections to institutions way more reliable than Mint. Extremely happy with this app."
App Store Review
“It’s ability to recognize recurring bills is incredible, [and] makes me less anxious worrying that I’ll miss something. Run, don’t walk!”
App Store Review
"This app is so much better than any of the others I’ve tried. My favorite feature is assigning transactions for review which really helps me stay on top of each purchase."
App Store Review
"I have tried and used many budgeting apps — Mint, copilot, rocket money— and Monarch is by far the best one. I love the customization and monthly overviews. I feel more in control of my finances."
App Store Review
"Monarch has been a game-changer for how my wife and I manage our finances. It’s transformed our money conversations from stressful guesswork into a clear, shared plan of action."
App Store Review
"
Monarch Money is the best budgeting app overall for 2024. It's the best for anyone looking to cut expenses and increase savings—especially couples or families.
"
Wall Street Journal
The 5 Best Budgeting Apps to Make Managing Your Money Easier in 2024
"
I looked at Monarch Money, NerdWallet, Rocket Money, Quicken Simplifi, and YNAB (You Need A Budget). My top pick? Monarch Money. Monarch is more than just a budgeting app. It provides everything you need to manage your personal finances.
"
ZDNET
I tested the best Mint alternatives, and this is my preferred money app
"
It’s like if someone took notes on what my partner and my dreams are for a budgeting app and made them come true, from how easy it is to stay up to date on what we owe each other to the expansive cash flow section.
"
Elite Daily
I Tried 5 Budgeting Apps For Couples & Found My $-Saving Holy Grail
"
We like Monarch because you can customize your dashboard, choosing what you want to see and what you don’t. Monarch categorizes your transactions for you [and] allows you to collaborate with your partner or a financial advisor on your budget.
"
Forbes
Best Budgeting Apps Of November 2024
"
Monarch is consistently highly rated by users with a lot of financial balls in the air, including multiple credit cards, a 401(k), IRA, loans, etc., and minimal bandwidth to deal with them.
"
The Cut
It’s Time to Try a New Budgeting App
"
Monarch offers a ton of features, including customizable reports, goal tracking and the ability to manage all of your bills and subscriptions in one calendar. For no extra cost, you can invite your partner to your account and get a joint view of your shared finances.
"
USA Today
7 best budgeting apps of October 2024
Community resources
Community resources
Reddit Community
Join our growing community of 30,000+ Redditors. Ask questions and share feedback on what we’re building.
r/monarchmoney
Our Blog
We share expert insights and data-backed research that helps you with your money questions whether big or small.
Read now
PRICING
Try Monarch free for 7 days
See and manage your finances all in one place. No ads and best-in-class connectivity. Collaborate with your partner or advisor at no extra cost.
View pricing
Track, budget, and feel good about your money with Monarch in your corner.

Your first week is on us
Monarch is your home base for money clarity, with guidance tailored to your specific needs. Track everything in one place, get a clear plan forward, and feel confident about your next money move.

Free 7-day trial, then $99.99/year. Cancel in settings before trial ends. Payment method required.
Plus
Advanced tools for long-term planning and multiple income streams

billed $199.99 annually
Everything in Core, plus
Forecast your path to retirement
Track business income and expenses
Get P&L reports and tax-prep exports
Access advanced investment analysis
Create a will to protect what you've built
Try Monarch free for 7 days
Free 7-day trial, then $199.99/year. Cancel in settings before trial ends. Payment method required.
Why pay for a personal finance app?
If you're wondering how you should best manage your finances, we encourage you to consider a subscription-based app instead of a free one. Here's why:
Never any ads
When you are paying for a service, you are the customer. Free services are incentivized to sell your data to advertisers and build features that make you click more ads, not features that actually help you.
Industry-best data connectivity
Personal finance apps are only useful when they are able to sync with real-time data from all of your accounts. Free services can't dedicate the same amount of resources to data quality, resulting in stale information.
We never sell your financial data
Your financial data is extremely sensitive. It's also extremely valuable to advertisers. Companies with free offerings rely on selling this data to advertisers for profit. But not us.
We’re not going anywhere
Trusting a new personal finance app is a commitment, one we take seriously. Our revenue comes directly from our members, ensuring we develop features you’ll love and grow a healthy business while doing so.
Everything you need to manage your money, all in one place
Whether you’re just getting started or want to plan further ahead, Monarch has a plan that fits your needs.

The reviews are in
“No resource has helped me better understand how to handle money, honestly. You all have made a fantastic product that is well-worth the price. Thank you, thank you, thank you!”
“This is the app I’ve always wanted. Well worth the price!”
“Monarch Money may cost $99 a year, but it is feature rich and well worth the price. Their flexibility with budgeting by category or group is amazing…and the concept of a “family” or “household” allowing for flagging transactions as “Needs Review” and assigning to a family member is the cherry on top.”
"Worth every penny! Great features that are always getting added. Even better customer service!"
"I thought Mint was the best but turns out Monarch is even better!!! I just love everything about this app, the budgeting, the cash flow, reports. Gives me amazing insights into my finances and well worth the extremely reasonable price tag!"
"Love the interface and ease of use and absolutely love the ad-free experience.  Happy to pay a reasonable price for value and know the I’m not the product being sold to advertisers. Wish I would have found Monarch sooner."

What is the cost of a subscription?
What's included in the Plus tier?
What if I sign up, but decide Monarch isn’t right for me?

analysis.name: Monarch Money
analysis.tagline: The modern way to manage money
analysis.value_proposition: An all-in-one personal finance app that connects all your accounts, budgets, and goals in one place—built for individuals, couples, and small business owners who want clarity without ads or data selling.
analysis.ideal_customer: Couples and individuals (including Mint refugees and small business owners) who want a premium, privacy-focused personal finance dashboard with partner collaboration and investment tracking

features.name: net worth tracking
features.description: Aggregates all bank accounts, credit cards, loans, real estate, and investments into a single net worth view
features.evidence_quote: Connect all your bank accounts, credit cards, loans, real estate, and investments to see your entire financial picture

features.name: transaction aggregation
features.description: Pulls all transactions from connected accounts into one searchable, reviewable list
features.evidence_quote: Monarch brings all your transactions into one clean, searchable list—no more jumping between apps or bank websites

features.name: transaction review workflow
features.description: Mark individual transactions as reviewed to stay on top of spending and flag unexpected charges
features.evidence_quote: You can mark transactions as reviewed to stay on top of your spending and quickly spot anything unexpected

features.name: automatic transaction categorization
features.description: Auto-categorizes transactions and allows fine-tuning with advanced custom rules
features.evidence_quote: Categorize transactions automatically and fine-tune with advanced rules

features.name: recurring subscription detection
features.description: Automatically detects recurring subscriptions (streaming, gyms, memberships) and surfaces forgotten charges
features.evidence_quote: Monarch automatically detects your recurring subscriptions—like streaming services, gyms, or app memberships

features.name: bill calendar
features.description: Calendar view of upcoming bills and subscription due dates with reminders
features.evidence_quote: I love how many features (bill calendar, cash flow manager, easy budgeting, goal setup and tracking)

features.name: subscription reminders
features.description: Sends reminders about subscriptions and upcoming bills before they hit
features.evidence_quote: Get reminders about subscriptions and upcoming bills

features.name: flexible budgeting
features.description: Two different budgeting approaches that adapt to user needs rather than forcing a rigid system
features.evidence_quote: Find your fit with two different budgeting approaches

features.name: auto-generated budget from spending history
features.description: Automatically creates a budget baseline from real historical spending patterns
features.evidence_quote: Create a budget automatically based on real spending patterns

features.name: overspend alerts
features.description: Proactive alerts warning user before a budget category is exceeded
features.evidence_quote: Get alerts before you overspend

features.name: savings goals
features.description: Set savings targets (vacation, home, emergency fund), track progress, and get contribution guidance
features.evidence_quote: Create a clear plan to save for what matters—whether it's a home, a vacation, or a rainy day fund

features.name: debt paydown goals
features.description: Plan and track progress toward paying down debt alongside savings goals
features.evidence_quote: Plan and stay on track for savings and debt pay down goals

features.name: goal contribution guidance
features.description: Surfaces recommended monthly contribution amounts needed to hit each goal on time
features.evidence_quote: Get guidance for monthly contributions needed to achieve your goals

features.name: goals 3.0
features.description: Updated goals experience (major refresh shipped May 2026)
features.evidence_quote: Introducing Goals 3.0 — Last updated May 19, 2026

features.name: custom reports
features.description: Customizable charts showing spending trends, income, and net worth over time
features.evidence_quote: Dive deep into your finances with customizable charts that reveal where your money's going

features.name: cash flow visualization
features.description: Visual representation of money coming in and going out over time
features.evidence_quote: From your net worth to day-to-day spending and cash flow, feel confident about where you're at

features.name: investment tracking
features.description: Tracks investment performance and monitors portfolio diversification
features.evidence_quote: Track investment performance and monitor diversification

features.name: advanced investment analysis
features.description: Deeper investment analysis beyond basic performance tracking
features.evidence_quote: Access advanced investment analysis

features.name: equity compensation tracking
features.description: Tracks RSUs, stock options, and other equity compensation as part of net worth
features.evidence_quote: Track equity compensation for a more complete picture of your net worth

features.name: retirement forecasting
features.description: Charts path to retirement with real account numbers and projected outcomes
features.evidence_quote: Chart your path to retirement with real numbers

features.name: financial scenario modeling
features.description: Models how life events (new job, house remodel, having kids) reshape long-term financial plan
features.evidence_quote: Model how a new job, house remodel, or kids could reshape your plan

features.name: small business / llc tracking
features.description: Tracks LLC, rental property, or side business finances separately from personal accounts
features.evidence_quote: Track your LLC, rental property, or side business separately from personal finances

features.name: p&l reports
features.description: Dedicated profit & loss tracking for each tracked business entity
features.evidence_quote: See dedicated P&L tracking for each business

features.name: tax prep export
features.description: Export-ready reports formatted for tax season preparation
features.evidence_quote: Get export-ready reports for tax season

features.name: will creation
features.description: In-app estate planning tool to create a will
features.evidence_quote: Create a will to protect what you've built

features.name: ai assistant
features.description: AI chat assistant for financial questions, with guidance informed by financial professionals
features.evidence_quote: Ask your AI Assistant anything, with guidance shaped by financial professionals

features.name: weekly financial summary
features.description: Automated weekly digest of spending, net worth changes, and upcoming expenses
features.evidence_quote: Get a weekly summary of your spending, net worth, and upcoming expenses

features.name: partner collaboration
features.description: Invite a partner to shared financial view, joint budgeting, and shared goals at no extra cost
features.evidence_quote: Invite your partner to see your full picture, budget together, and reach your goals faster

features.name: financial professional sharing
features.description: Share read-only access to accounts and data with a financial advisor or accountant
features.evidence_quote: Share read-only access with a financial professional

features.name: multi-data-provider bank connectivity
features.description: Syncs with multiple financial data providers connecting 13,000+ institutions; claims more providers than competitors
features.evidence_quote: Monarch syncs with multiple financial data providers, more than other apps, to connect with 13,000+ financial institutions

features.name: home value tracking
features.description: Tracks real estate home value via Zillow integration as part of net worth
features.evidence_quote: Track your home value with Zillow integration

features.name: crypto tracking
features.description: Tracks cryptocurrency holdings via Coinbase integration
features.evidence_quote: Track crypto with Coinbase integration

features.name: apple card sync
features.description: Seamless syncing with Apple Card account data
features.evidence_quote: Sync your Apple Card seamlessly

features.name: receipt scanning
features.description: Scan and itemize physical receipts to enrich transaction categorization detail
features.evidence_quote: Scan and itemize receipts for detailed categorization

features.name: retail sync browser extension
features.description: Browser extension to sync retail/shopping data directly into transaction history
features.evidence_quote: Using the Retail Sync Extension — Last updated May 25, 2026

features.name: cross-platform access
features.description: Available on web, iOS, Android, and iPad with real-time sync across all devices
features.evidence_quote: Monarch works seamlessly across web, iOS, and Android—so you can check in on your money anytime, anywhere

features.name: canada support
features.description: Available in Canada with localized bank connections
features.evidence_quote: Canadian Connection Statuses — Last updated April 2, 2026

features.name: financial professional directory
features.description: Directory for financial professionals to list themselves and connect with Monarch users
features.evidence_quote: Professional Directory

features.name: financial health calculator
features.description: Standalone calculator tool for assessing overall financial health
features.evidence_quote: Financial Health Calculator

features.name: debt payoff calculator
features.description: Standalone calculator for modeling debt payoff scenarios
features.evidence_quote: Debt Payoff Calculator

features.name: mortgage calculator
features.description: Standalone mortgage payment and affordability calculator
features.evidence_quote: Mortgage Calculator

integrations: 13,000+ banks and financial institutions (via multiple data providers)
differentiators: Multiple financial data providers—more than other apps—for 13,000+ institution connections
Partner collaboration included at no extra cost
Financial professional read-only sharing built in
Supports both personal and small business (LLC/rental) tracking in one app
Will creation included in Plus tier
Retail sync browser extension for shopping data

praised: Building a budget is easy, tracking spending is awesome, and everything I wanted in an app this can do! So easy and flexible.
Because of this app, I feel like I am not winging it financially anymore and feel on top of my spending.
Connections to institutions way more reliable than Mint. Extremely happy with this app.
Its ability to recognize recurring bills is incredible, makes me less anxious worrying that I'll miss something.
My favorite feature is assigning transactions for review which really helps me stay on top of each purchase.
Best budgeting app overall for 2024 (Wall Street Journal) — best for cutting expenses and increasing savings, especially couples
Transformed our money conversations from stressful guesswork into a clear, shared plan of action (couples use case)
Intuitive customization with a powerful set of pre-built functionality
complaints: Privacy concern: MonarchMoney.com's Trackers vs. User Privacy (HN post flagging use of tracking/analytics technologies)

tiers.name: Core
tiers.headline_inclusions: Budget, net worth, transactions, goals, reports, AI assistant, partner collab, 13k+ bank connections

tiers.name: Plus
tiers.headline_inclusions: Everything in Core + retirement forecasting, business/LLC tracking, P&L, equity comp, scenario modeling, will creation

pricing.notes: Both tiers billed annually only at advertised monthly rate ($99.99/yr Core, $199.99/yr Plus); monthly billing available via toggle but monthly price not visible in scraped content. 7-day free trial on both tiers (payment method required). 30% off first year promo code WELCOME available for new users on annual Core plan only, not combinable with other offers, not redeemable in-app. No permanent free tier.
